title: Had in Simple Past
explanation:
'Had' का उपयोग Simple Past Tense में किसी अनुभव, परिस्थिति या अवस्था को बताने के लिए होता है। यह हमेशा भूतकाल (past) को दर्शाता है।

'Had' is used in Simple Past Tense to describe past experiences, situations, and states. It always refers to the past.
rules: Had is used for ALL subjects in simple past
Use had for experiences: We had a good time
Use had for physical states: She had a headache
Use had for eating/drinking: We had dinner
Time expressions like yesterday, last week, etc. confirm past tense
keyPoints: Had का उपयोग अनुभव बताने के लिए: We had fun
Had का उपयोग शारीरिक अवस्था के लिए: He had a cold
Had का उपयोग खाने-पीने के लिए: I had breakfast
